childhood.familyBackground: Born 1938. Family background in business and finance.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 1938년생. 사업 및 금융 배경이 있는 가족.
childhood.education: Accounting degree from Escuela Bancaria y Comercial, Mexico
childhood.educationKo: 멕시코 Escuela Bancaria y Comercial에서 회계 학위
childhood.earlyLife: Started career in banking sector. Transition to chemical and manufacturing industry.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 은행 부문에서 경력 시작. 화학 및 제조 산업으로 전환.

careerTimeline.event: Started business in chemical manufacturing sector
Founded/acquired Mexichem as major chemical company
Mexichem became global chemical and pipes conglomerate
careerTimeline.eventKo: Mexichem이 글로벌 화학 및 파이프 재벌이 됨

careerTimeline.event: Chairman of Orbia Advance Corporation (formerly Mexichem)

personalTraits.knownFor: Building Mexichem into chemical industry leader, diversified manufacturing portfolio
personalTraits.knownForKo: Mexichem를 화학 산업 리더로 구축, 다각화된 제조 포트폴리오
